ddls:
CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subj_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "handedness" TEXT /* Handedness of the participant (right/left) */,
  "participation_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant started the experiment */,
  "consent" INTEGER /* Whether the participant has given consent to participate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subj_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Condition of the trial */,
  "correct" INTEGER /* Whether the participant's answer was correct (1) or not (0) */,
  "key_press" INTEGER /* Key pressed by the participant */,
  "rt" INTEGER /* Reaction time of the participant */,
  "subj_id" INTEGER /* Subject ID of the participant */,
  "trial_order" INTEGER /* Order of the trial in the experiment */,
  "trial_name" TEXT /* Descriptive name of the trial */,
  "stimulus" TEXT /* Stimulus used in the trial */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trial */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trial */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the trial */,
  "trial_type" TEXT /* Type of trial (e.g., visual, auditory) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Descriptive name of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the condition */,
  "stimulus_type" TEXT /* Type of stimulus used in the condition (e.g., image, sound) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "answers" (
  "answer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each possible answer */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Condition ID of the answer */,
  "answer_description" TEXT /* Description of the possible answer */,
  "correct_answer" INTEGER /* Whether the answer is correct (1) or not (0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("answer_id")
)
column_names: Date when the participant started the experiment
Whether the participant has given consent to participate
Whether the participant's answer was correct (1) or not (0)
Order of the trial in the experiment
Additional notes or comments about the trial
Type of stimulus used in the condition (e.g., image, sound)
Unique identifier for each possible answer
Whether the answer is correct (1) or not (0)
